mapper.select: SELECT id, user_vocabulary_entry_id, public_entry_id, correct_option, selected_option, wrong_submissions FROM quiz_attempts WHERE id = #{attemptId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT qa.id, qa.prompt_type AS promptType, qa.prompt_text AS promptText, CASE WHEN qa.prompt_type = 'CN_TO_EN' THEN qa.correct_option ELSE qa.prompt_text END AS currentWord, COALESCE(pv.phonetic, uv.phonetic, '') AS phonetic, COALESCE(pv.audio_url, uv.audio_url, '') AS audioUrl, qa.option_a AS optionA, qa.option_b AS optionB, qa.option_c AS optionC, qa.option_d AS optionD FROM quiz_attempts qa LEFT JOIN public_vocabulary_entries pv ON pv.id = qa.public_entry_id LEFT JOIN user_vocabulary_entries uv ON uv.id = qa.user_vocabulary_entry_id WHERE qa.session_id = #{sessionId} AND qa.selected_option IS NULL ORDER BY qa.id DESC LIMIT 1
